title: Rewrite TUI as Linux-only PR generation app
description:
## Summary
- Replace the legacy Windows-era multi-file TUI with a new Linux-only ratatui runtime built on typed worker jobs, boot probes, and a three-pane Generate PR screen.
- Add structured LLM prompt context (per-change entries + aggregate diff), a typed draft response (`type`, `branch_slug`, `title`, `description`), and `pr/{type}/{slug}` branch naming.
- Polish Generate UX: head/base ordering warnings, picker modal scrolling, phase-aware next-step guidance, normalized headings, simplified footer, and deterministic UI snapshot tooling.

## Why
The old app froze on Windows due to crossterm and required a complete rewrite to gain reliable terminal input (kitty keyboard protocol), a clean job/cache architecture, and an LLM-driven PR drafting flow with structured output. Subsequent commits incrementally fixed prompt context, branch naming, and visual regressions caught by the new snapshot workflow.

## Verification
- Not run (not provided)
